description: Composition Black running shorts for men made of 100% polyester, has an innerwear attached, an insert pocket on the inside and swoosh logo in a reflective material towards the left hemline Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash cold with like colours Do not bleach, iron or dry clean Line dry Built with the breathability and zero-distraction fit that athletes demand, this pair of nike running shorts comes in a simple design. These high-performance shorts can be fully reversed for the versatility of two garments in one. Team it with tees and running shoes.
